title: acaena huttonii
intro: Acaena huttonii, also known as the New Zealand button bush or silver button, is a perennial plant native to New Zealand. It is a shrub-like plant with silvery foliage and small yellow flowers, and is often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves and stems of Acaena huttonii have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. Acaena huttonii can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and ointments to take advantage of its health benefits.
